creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, I already noticed this. Your analysis is correct. You can work around the problem, as you noticed.

The problem with these ports is, that port origin and package name have been changed at the same time.

I tried to fix this, but ran out of time. I cannot spend much time on this problem during the next few days, so I'd appreciate if you could send a patch. Else I'll try to fix this in the first week of March.

I'm working on a major rewrite of portmaster (unfinished snapshots of this work can be found in my fork of the portmaster repository). The new version will not use global variables and recursion (to create local scope despite the use of global variables), but will use subroutines with local variables and explicit parameter passing. This change will simplify debugging and further development, but I'm not there, yet ...
